cmd.app_tour_done: Waxaa la bilaabayaa hagista — isticmaal Xiga si aad u sii socoto.
cmd.app_tour_hint: Hagid la hagayo oo astaamaha waaweyn
cmd.clear_my_answers_done: Ku xaqiiji sanduuqa wada-hadalka si aad u tirtirto jawaabahaaga.
cmd.clear_workspace: Tirtir wax walba oo bilow cusub
cmd.clear_workspace_hint: Wuxuu saaraa nuxurka iyo taariikhda hadda — marka hore wuu ku weydiinayaa
cmd.create_lesson_done: Waxaa la bilaabayaa socodka casharka ku saabsan “
cmd.create_lesson_done3: — AlloBot ayaa ku hagi doona tallaabooyinka xiga.
cmd.create_lesson_done_blank: Waxaa la bilaabayaa socodka casharka la hagayo — AlloBot ayaa kaa weydiin doona mowduucaaga.
cmd.create_lesson_hint: Wuxuu bilaabayaa socodka la hagayo — sheeg mowduuc iyo fasal
cmd.cycle_reading_theme_hint: Ku wareeg diiran, sepia, mugdi, dyslexia-saaxiib, iyo wax kale
cmd.export_pack_done: Waxaa la diyaarinayaa soo dejinta xirmada casharka…
cmd.export_pack_hint: Soo dejiso casharka sida fayl is-ku-filan
cmd.font_reset_done: Cabbirka qoraalka waxaa dib loogu celiyay kii caadiga ahaa.
cmd.font_reset_hint: Dib ugu noqo cabbirka caadiga ah
cmd.generate_analysis_hint: Ku samee falanqaynta isha nuxurka hadda
cmd.generate_quiz: Samee imtixaan kan ka mid ah
cmd.generate_simplified_done: Waxaa la abuurayaa nooc ka fudud…
cmd.generate_simplified_hint: Abuur heer akhris ka fudud — dheh “ilaa fasalka N” si aad u bartilmaameedayso
cmd.go_dashboard_hint: Dib ugu noqo muuqaalka casharka ee weyn
cmd.launch_flashcards_hint: Ku baro qaamuuskan sida kaararka xusuusta
cmd.line_spacing_less_done: Kala fogaanta safafka waxaa loo dejiyay
cmd.line_spacing_more_done: Kala fogaanta safafka waxaa loo dejiyay
cmd.open_class_session_done: Sanduuqa wada-hadalka fadhiga fasalka waa la furay.
cmd.open_class_session_hint: Bilow ama ku biir fadhi fasal oo toos ah
cmd.open_document_builder_hint: Dhis oo soo saar dukumiintiyo kala duwan
cmd.open_educator_hub_done: Xarunta Macallinka waa la furay — kaarka Document Pipeline wuxuu u dhow yahay sare.
cmd.open_export_menu_done: Menu-ga soo saarista waa la furay.
cmd.open_lumen_done: Lumen waxaa lagu furay STEM Lab-ka.
cmd.open_persona_chat_hint: Waraysi qof-AI ah oo ku saabsan mowduucan
cmd.open_project_settings_hint: AI mashruuc-gaar ah, dukashaynta, iyo xakamaynta Socratic
cmd.open_stem_lab_hint: Qalab sayniska & xisaabta oo isdhexgal ah
cmd.open_submission_inbox_hint: Dib u eeg shaqada ardaydu gudbiyeen
cmd.open_text_settings_hint: Doorashooyinka farta, kala fogaanta, iyo midabka
cmd.open_translate_done: Sanduuqa wada-hadalka turjumaadda waa la furay.
cmd.pipeline_downloads_done: Qaybta Soo Dejinta — PDF-ka calaamadaysan waa nuqulka diyaarka u ah wadaagista.
cmd.pipeline_downloads_hint: Wuxuu u soo gariiraa qaybta Soo Dejinta
cmd.pipeline_fix_again: Mar kale ku samee hagaajinta helitaanka
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_done: Waxaa la socodsiinayaa wareeg hagaajin oo kale…
cmd.pipeline_fix_again_hint: Wareeg hagaajin oo kale si dhibcaha kor loogu qaado
cmd.pipeline_issues_hint: Wuxuu ku hadlaa arrimaha ugu sarreeya ee hadhay
cmd.pipeline_issues_more2: oo dheeraad ah oo ku jira nuxurka Arrimaha.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_done: Waa la tirtiray — soo geli dukumiinti cusub si aad u bilowdo.
cmd.pipeline_new_doc_hint: Tirtir natiijadan oo soo geli fayl cusub
cmd.pipeline_score_hint: Wuxuu ku hadlaa ka hor → ka dib ee hadda
cmd.pipeline_score_none: Ma jiro socod hagaajin oo furan.
cmd.pipeline_stop_done: Waxaa la joojinayaa wareegga hadda ka dib.
cmd.pipeline_stop_hint: Jooji wareegga hadda ka dib — wuxuu ilaalinayaa wixii la sameeyay
cmd.pipeline_verification_hint: Wuxuu u soo gariiraa qaybta Xaqiijinta
cmd.read_this_page_done: Akhriyaha bogga waa la furay — dooro meesha aad ka bilaabayso.
cmd.stop_reading_done: Akhrinta cod dheer waa la joojiyay.
cmd.submit_work_done: Waxaa la furayaa sanduuqa wada-hadalka gudbinta…
cmd.switch_theme_done: Mawduuca waa la beddelay — wuxuu wareegayaa iftiin, kadib mugdi, kadib farqi sare.
cmd.switch_theme_hint: Ku wareeg iftiin → mugdi → farqi sare
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_consent: Waxaa la furayaa sanduuqa wada-hadalka oggolaanshaha isku-xirka daruuraha — halkaas ku xaqiiji si aad u shiddo.
cmd.toggle_cloud_sync_hint: Isku xir shaqadaada daruuraha (markii ugu horreysay oggolaansho ayuu weydiinayaa)
cmd.toggle_color_overlay_hint: Ku wareeg midab jilicsan oo bogga dul saaran
cmd.toggle_dictation_hint: Ku hadal halkii aad qori lahayd
cmd.toggle_focus_mode_hint: Madoobee wax kasta marka laga reebo nuxurka
cmd.toggle_help_mode_done: Habka caawimaadda waa la beddelay — guji xakameyn kasta si aad uga barato.
cmd.toggle_help_mode_hint: Guji wax kasta si aad u barato waxa uu sameeyo
cmd.toggle_socratic_hint: Saaxiib barasho oo su'aal marka hore keena
cmd.toggle_visual_supports_hint: Tilmaamo sawir oo qoraalka la socda
cmd.translate_document_done2: oo waxaa la iftiimiyay badhanka — riix Turjun si aad u socodsiiso. (Turjumaadaha waxay isticmaalaan qoondada AI, sidaa darteed gujiska adigaa leh.)
cmd.translate_document_hint: Wuxuu hore u buuxiyaa luqadda oo tilmaamaa badhanka
cmd.translate_document_pick: Waxaa la iftiimiyay xakamayaasha turjumaadda — dooro luqad oo riix Turjun.
cmd.undo_settings: Ka noqo beddelkii ugu dambeeyay ee dejinta
cmd.undo_settings_done: Waxaa dib loo soo celiyay dejintaadii hore (haddii ay jirtay beddel laga noqdo).
cmd.undo_settings_hint: Dib u soo celi dejintii hore ee casharka (ma aha nuxurka la abuuray)
cmd.voice_start_done: Xakamaynta codka waa shidan. Sheeg amar sida “qoraal weyn” ama “fur xarunta macallinka”. Dheh “jooji dhegaysiga” si aad u dhammayso.
cmd.voice_start_hint: AlloBot wuxuu dhegaystaa amarrada ilaa aad joojiso
cmd.voice_stop_done: Xakamaynta codka waa la damiyay — makarafoonka waa la sii daayay.
cmd.zen_on_done: Habka zen waa shidan — riix Ctrl+K oo socodsii “exit zen” si aad ugu soo noqoto.
cmd.zen_on_hint: Qari wax kasta marka laga reebo nuxurka
palette.confirm: ⚠ Mar kale riix Enter si aad u xaqiijiso
palette.footer: Tallaabo kasta waa la ku dhawaaqaa. Ctrl+K ayaa beddela.
palette.no_match: Ma jiro amar u dhigma. Sheekada bot-ka (iyo dhowaan codka) waxay fahmaan codsiyo qaab-furan.
palette.placeholder: Qor amar — “qoraal weyn”, “xarunta macallinka”, “bogga ii akhri”…
cmd.set_ui_language_done: Waxaan ku tilmaamay doorashada luqadda ee madaxa — halkaas ka dooro luqaddaada.
cmd.set_ui_language_hint: U bood doorashada luqadda ee madaxa
cmd.set_ui_language_miss: Doorashada luqadda interfeyska waxay ku taallaa baarka liiska sare.
